decisions: D98: project and blueprint preserve an artifact-general isolated review core; V0 formally ships only the code_diff audit profile; non-diff types remain ReviewResult-only until adapter, trusted anchor, eval baseline, and renderer profile gates pass.
D99: finalize generates and validates candidate audit.json and audit.html in a hidden sibling staging workspace, then publishes them with a same-filesystem no-clobber directory rename.
D99 failure semantics: a newly accepted target stays absent on pre-commit hard failure; a pre-existing, symlink, or race-created target stays unchanged and cannot count as this run's success.
prepare returns a machine-readable locator with run_id, final_dir, and staging_dir; the Skill does not reproduce path naming rules.
independent render --out atomically replaces only the requested HTML; failures preserve the old HTML and never modify audit.json.
evidence.scope: documentation, blueprint, plan, ADR, and design assets only; no implementation migration
validation: all JSON files parsed; two audit fixtures passed unique-ID and edge-endpoint checks
inline JavaScript in both HTML reference artifacts passed node --check
two SVGs passed latest Fireworks validate-svg.sh plus xmllint
